arts.sum: Real Sociedad are pushing to enter the European places in La Liga, and a victory could see them go into sixth. Getafe have scored just 14 goals this season, with no side managing fewer in La Liga. ...

arts.ttl: 8 stars who rejected Liverpool like Arsenal-bound Martin Zubimendi and what happened to them
arts.sum: Liverpool have been responsible for some of the most high-profile and successful transfers in the history of the game, but that doesn't mean they haven't been snubbed by their fair share of superstars
